title: Phase 0.1 signal payload
description: The structured output of the signal-gate module (the ten-step gauntlet plus a parallel generic-media check). Written to screener/runs/<SIG_ID>/signal_payload.json by the signal-gate synthesis.

event_id.description: sha256 (first 12 hex) of normalized headline + source URL.

similarity_score.description: Best-match similarity vs the 48-72h ledger window (agent-native textual-overlap rubric mapped to the cosine bands).

fact_delta_fields.description: Which extraction fields changed (guidance, deal_value, fine_amount, eps, revenue, counterparty, court, regulator).

is_generic_media.description: OPTIONAL for back-compat: payloads written before the generic-media check may omit the five generic-media fields; when present they must obey the constraints here (mirrors the sibling change that kept its new fields optional so pre-existing payloads validate unchanged). True when the article matches one of the generic-media categories (market-cap roundup, index-movement summary, top gainers/losers, generic market-close story, many-companies-no-thesis, or lacking specificity/quantifiability) — a content/format judgment, independent of investability_score. Written by screener-generic-media-detector.

generic_media_reason.description: One plain sentence naming the matched generic-media categories (or 'none matched') and the evidence.

specificity_score.description: 0 = applies to the whole market/an index/10+ names with no distinguishable thesis; 100 = one company, one distinct, attributable event.

quantifiability_score.description: 0 = adjectives only, no checkable figure; 100 = a precise figure tied to one attributable cause. An aggregate tally across many names scores low even with a real number.

investability_score.description: 0 = a PM could not change a single position on this fact alone; 100 = the fact alone would change a PM's view of one specific name or thesis. Distinct from candidate-surfacing's later 'investability' notion (tradability/liquidity of a mapped ticker) — this field is about whether the ARTICLE carries an actionable insight, not whether a stock is easy to trade.

materiality_math.description: The visible arithmetic: base inputs, penalties applied, overrides applied.

filing_type.description: Step 2b/10b classification from scripts/screener_filing_classifier.py. Optional so pre-existing payloads validate unchanged.

filing_type_rationale.description: Step 10b's derate explanation (or no-op explanation), verbatim from the classifier script.
